news.headline: WH Press Sec. Leavitt: Tax cuts are the second step of Trump economic agenda.
SyncWords launches Ultra-Low Latency AI Captions with Kobe Muxer, redefining live video accessibility. #AI #captioning #technology
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in New York, SyncWords, a top provider of AI-driven video captioning and translation solutions, unveiled the introduction of Ultra-Low Latency AI Captions with Kobe Muxer™. This innovative cloud-based technology is revolutionizing live video accessibility by significantly reducing delays. SyncWords aims to enhance user experience and ensure wider access to audio content in real time.

news.headline: Shield Advisory Group ranked No. 2 on Inc.'s 2025 list of fastest-growing private companies in the Northeast region, with companies showing a median growth rate of 100%.
news.summary: Businesses featured on the Inc. Regionals: Northeast list experienced a median growth rate of 100 percent. Recently, Shield Advisory Group was recognized as the second-ranking company on this list. This information was disclosed by Inc., a prominent media brand and resource for aspiring entrepreneurs and industry influencers. The announcement was made on April 3, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: Lilabean Foundation partners with CBTN to advance pediatric brain cancer research at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia. #Breakthroughs #Research #PediatricCancer
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, the Lilabean Foundation (LBF) announced its collaboration with the Children's Brain Tumor Network (CBTN) at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia to advance pediatric brain cancer research. This partnership marks a significant development in the fight against this disease. The LBF's support is pivotal in driving vital research initiatives for children diagnosed with brain tumors. This initiative contributes to the broader goal of improving treatment outcomes and quality of life for young patients. The collaborative effort between LBF and CBTN highlights the importance of working together to address pediatric brain cancer, benefitting countless families and patients.

news.headline: Innovative RSU program introduced to retain crucial staff members effectively.
LightPath Technologies to participate in Photonics Spectra Infrared Imaging Summit 2025 on April 16. General Manager to present in Orlando, FL. ($LPTH)
news.summary: The General Manager of LightPath Technologies in Plano, TX, Jason Liebert, is scheduled to give a presentation on Wednesday, April 16, 2025 in ORLANDO, Fla. The company, LightPath Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: LPTH), is a prominent supplier of next-generation optics and imaging.

news.headline: 72% of multifamily owners plan smart building upgrades, especially in access control, in the next 12 months -Parks Associates.
news.summary: A recently published white paper, created in collaboration with Kwikset, delves into the latest developments in contemporary access control solutions. Revealed in Dallas on April 3, 2025, during ISC West, the study by Parks Associates, titled "Modernizing Multifamily Housing: Retrofitting Access Control," explores innovative trends in this sector. The research aims to provide insights and strategies for upgrading access control in multifamily housing.

news.headline: Bobby Flay honors his cat by declaring April 5th as National Nacho Flay Day, launching with Made by Nacho.
news.summary: Today, in New York City, celebrity chef Bobby Flay and his renowned cat food brand, Made by Nacho, have officially launched National Nacho Flay Day in honor of his cherished cat. This new initiative celebrates the bond between pets and their owners, with Flay's premium chef-crafted cat food line taking center stage. The event marks a significant milestone for Flay and his brand, highlighting their commitment to providing quality products for pets. This launch is expected to garner attention nationwide and raise awareness about the importance of nutrition for pets.

news.headline: Flooring365.co.uk opens new showroom in Huddersfield, England providing expert guidance and competitive pricing.
news.summary: A newly opened showroom in Huddersfield, England, by Flooring365.co.uk on April 3, 2025, presents customers with an opportunity to browse a wide selection of flooring options in person. The showroom aims to provide expert guidance on flooring choices, allowing customers to visually and tactually assess their options before making a decision. This new facility boasts competitive prices, appealing to those seeking quality flooring solutions at affordable rates.

news.headline: Todd Probert appointed as President of U.S. Government at HawkEye 360, the leader in signals intelligence.
news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia on April 3, 2025, HawkEye 360, a prominent provider of signals intelligence data and analytics worldwide, has introduced Todd Probert as the President for the U.S. Government division. Tasked with overseeing the company's interactions with defense sectors, Probert will play a significant role in steering strategic initiatives. This key appointment underscores HawkEye 360's commitment to strengthening its presence within the government sector.

news.headline: Community Options' golf tourney is back with a $200K matching gift from Phil Lian and Joan Mueller, supporting people with disabilities.
news.summary: In Lafayette Hill, Pennsylvania, on April 3, 2025, Community Options, a prominent national nonprofit organization aiding individuals with disabilities, is thrilled to reveal the comeback of the Philip E. Lian and Joan L. Mueller Phenomenal Golf Classic. This charity golf event will be held annually, aiming to support individuals with disabilities in need.

news.headline: 68% of condos sold below list price in February, highest in 5 years. Townhouses followed with 59.4% sold below asking.
news.summary: In Seattle, approximately 68.4% of U.S. condos sold in February were sold for less than their initial asking price, marking an increase from 63.3% the previous year. This percentage is the highest recorded for February in the past five years. Similarly, the share of townhouses selling below their original asking price also rose to 59.4% from 54.7% compared to the previous year, reaching the highest February level in half a decade. These statistics were revealed in a recent report from Redfin, a technology-driven real estate brokerage listed on NASDAQ as RDFN.

news.headline: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) reports March 2025 trading stats & revenue. View details at https://ir.theice.com/supplemental-information.
news.summary: In Atlanta and New York, Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), a prominent global technology and data provider, released its trading volume and revenue data for March 2025. The information is available on the company’s investor relations website at https://ir.theice.com/ir-resources/supplemental-information in the Monthly Statistics Tracking spreadsheet. ICE initiated the development of a derivatives platform 25 years ago to cater to customers’ changing risk management requirements.

news.headline: Globus Medical (GMED) acquires Nevro Corp, a global medical device company, delivering solutions for chronic pain.
news.summary: In Audubon, Pennsylvania on April 3rd, 2025, Globus Medical, Inc. (NYSE: GMED), a prominent musculoskeletal technology firm, revealed the finalization of its acquisition of Nevro Corp. This globally recognized medical device company specializes in offering transformative solutions for chronic pain treatment. The acquisition marks a significant development for Globus Medical as it broadens its portfolio and strengthens its position in the medical industry.

news.headline: Fitch: We forecast China GDP to increase by 4.4% in 2025, from 5.0% in 2024.

Adtalem Global Education to hold Q3 FY2025 conference call on May 8 at 5pm, Chicago.

The call is scheduled to take place on Thursday, May 8 at 5pm Eastern Time. This announcement was made via a press release distributed by the company.

news.headline: Roper Technologies will release first quarter 2025 financial results on April 28, 2025, with a conference call scheduled for 8:00 AM ET. Phone: +1 800-836-8184 (US/Canada) or +1 646-357-8785, conference call ID 07867. Website will have webcast details.
news.summary: Roper Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROP) from Sarasota, Florida, will unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on April 28, 2025. The results cover the period ending March 31, 2025, and will be disclosed before the market opens. A conference call discussing these outcomes is set for April 28, 2025, at 8:00 AM ET. Interested individuals can join the call through webcast or by dialing +1 800-836-8184 (US/Canada) or +1 646-357-8785, using conference call ID 07867. The company will provide webcast details and conference call resources on its Investors website section before the call begins.

news.headline: Ingersoll Rand adds Michelle Swanenburg to Board of Directors on April 3, 2025. Stock symbol: IR.
news.summary: Davidson, North Carolina - Ingersoll Rand Inc. (ticker symbol: IR) has appointed Michelle Swanenburg to its Board of Directors as of April 3, 2025. Ingersoll Rand is a worldwide company specializing in mission-critical flow creation, and providing life sciences and industrial solutions. This appointment adds another member to the board, increasing its effectiveness in overseeing company operations and strategic decisions. Michelle Swanenburg's inclusion will bring valuable expertise and perspectives to the board as they navigate the global market landscape.

news.summary: Safe Harbor Financial, a company listed on Nasdaq as SHFS, has announced an expansion of its partnership with Würk, a leading Human Capital Management company in the cannabis industry. The abstract will showcase the company's technology and early study findings. The conference is scheduled for April 13-16, 2025, where Autonomix will share its focus on developing precision nerve-targeted treatments.

The Company, listed on TSX as CTS, FSE as 0ZB, and OTCQX as CTSDF, emphasized the importance of shareholders participating in the voting process. This acquisition is crucial for the company as it navigates through a period where demand in the defense sector is on the rise.

NewGen secures funding for international expansion, first target UAE, plans for additional growth strategies.
news.summary: NewGen is set to expand into the UAE as its primary focus, with plans for additional growth strategies in the future. This move signifies a significant milestone for the company as it looks to establish a presence in the UAE market. With an initial emphasis on this expansion, NewGen anticipates a substantial increase in its market reach and brand visibility. The company aims to capitalize on the growing opportunities in the UAE, with plans to introduce innovative products and services to capture a larger share of the market. This strategic decision is part of NewGen's broader plan to expand its operations internationally and tap into new markets for sustainable growth. The UAE expansion is projected to contribute to a notable increase in revenue and customer base for NewGen in the coming years, positioning the company for further success in the global market.

news.summary: The Savings Pass, accompanied by the BOSS Unlimited and Bundles of Minutes monthly calling packages, provide incredible discounts regardless of the location you call or the duration of your conversation.

news.headline: Navitas and Great Wall collaborate for 400V-DC power tech offering 8x power increase for AI data centers and industrial equipment.
news.summary: GaNSense™ technology has significantly increased power by 8 times for AI data centers, telecommunications, and industrial equipment when used in ultra-high power density DC-DC converters. This advancement is set to revolutionize the efficiency and capabilities of these sectors with significant impact on performance.

news.headline: RecycLiCo Battery Materials hires PRA Communications for strategic communications and stakeholder relations.
news.summary: RecycLiCo Battery Materials has announced their partnership with PRA Communications to oversee strategic communications and stakeholder relations. This move aims to enhance the company's outreach efforts and strengthen relationships with various stakeholders. RecycLiCo, a leading provider of battery materials, looks to leverage PRA Communications' expertise to reach a wider audience and improve engagement. news.headline: DRYWORLD aims to dominate the top soccer kit market, targeting top clubs and players globally.
Hotel Chocolat to open 2 new stores in Chicago this April in Lincoln Park and Lakeview, exciting chocolate lovers.
news.summary: In April this year, luxury chocolatier Hotel Chocolat from the UK will bring joy to residents of Chicago with the grand opening of two stores in Lincoln Park and Lakeview. The renowned chocolate brand is expanding its reach to cater to the city's sweet tooth enthusiasts. The new stores will offer a delectable range of chocolate products, providing locals with access to the exquisite confections that Hotel Chocolat is known for. Chicagoans can look forward to indulging in high-quality chocolates starting this April.

news.headline: New WaterFurnace 5 Series 3D offers three-in-one heating and cooling solution for residential use, released in April 2025.
news.summary: In Fort Wayne, Indiana, on April 3, 2025, WaterFurnace International launched the 5 Series 3D residential geothermal system. This innovative product offers a three-way heating and cooling solution, incorporating forced air heating, forced air cooling, and hydronic heat for radiant applications. The system is considered the most advanced of its kind and is anticipated to revolutionize the market.

news.headline: NCLH and NCLC announce exchange of $68,451,000 in 2025 Notes for $68,451,000 in 2030 Notes and $12,380,732 cash payment.
news.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. has announced a Second Exchange agreement with certain holders of its 5.375% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2025, exchanging $68,451,000 in principal amount for $68,451,000 in newly issued 0.875% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2030 and a cash payment of $12,380,732 plus accrued interest. This comes after a previous exchange agreement on April 1, 2025. The cash payment is funded by the proceeds from a Second Equity Offering.

news.headline: SoundThinking reports that ResourceRouter's customer base significantly grew in 2024, doubling in size. This increase was attributed to new patrol operations features that enhance officer efficiency and agency productivity amid staffing constraints.
news.summary: SoundThinking revealed today that ResourceRouter experienced a significant expansion in its customer base in 2024, with the number of customers more than doubling. This growth was propelled by the introduction of new patrol operations capabilities that offer essential field information to officers, allowing law enforcement agencies to enhance their efficiency despite operating with limited staff members.

news.headline: Neighborhood Ventures closes on 71-unit property in Phoenix for $1.34M in 36hrs, 35% off, using crowdfunding.
news.summary: In a span of only 36 hours, Neighborhood Ventures (NV) has successfully raised $1.34 million. This remarkable achievement comes shortly after acquiring a foreclosed property with 71 units in Phoenix at a notable discount of over 35%. NV is a prominent real estate investment firm that leverages crowdfunding to give opportunities to a wide range of investors, whether accredited or not.

news.headline: Manulife warns about NYSB offer to buy up to 250,000 shares, less than 0.02% of total, cautioning investors.
news.summary: Toronto-based financial services company, Manulife, has received notice of an unsolicited mini-tender offer from New York Stock and Bond LLC ("NYSB"). The offer proposes acquiring a maximum of 250,000 shares of Manulife common stock. This amount represents less than 0.02% of the total common shares outstanding. Manulife is listed on the TSX, NYSE, and PSE under the ticker symbol MFC, and on the SEHK as 945. The offer was revealed on April 3, 2025.

The financial details of the deal were not publicly disclosed. Kept Companies, Inc. is based in Fairfield and specializes in...

news.headline: Penelope adds 3 advisors to team for accelerating market growth. Marcia Wagner, Kevin Crain, and Lisa Kottler join.
news.summary: Today in New York on April 3, 2025, Penelope, a retirement services platform catering to small and mid-sized businesses, revealed their plan to expedite growth in new markets. The team welcomed three senior advisors - Marcia Wagner, Kevin Crain, and Lisa Kottler - to support this initiative.

news.headline: Commvault and SimSpace team up to launch cyber recovery range, integrating real attack simulations for enhanced preparedness.
news.summary: The Commvault® Recovery Range™, in collaboration with SimSpace, has introduced groundbreaking cyber preparedness by integrating authentic attack simulations with vital recovery exercises. This innovative approach marks a significant advancement in cybersecurity readiness. The partnership between Commvault and SimSpace is set to revolutionize the industry by offering a comprehensive solution for cybersecurity challenges. The launch of this cutting-edge technology took place in Tinton Falls, N.J. and Boston on April 3, 2025. This collaboration sets a new standard in cybersecurity by combining realistic attack scenarios with essential recovery practices, creating a more robust defense against cyber threats.

news.headline: Industry leaders are gathering in Washington, D.C. for the IAB Public Policy and Legal Summit 2025 to address challenges in digital advertising, including data privacy and AI. happening on April 3, 2025.
news.summary: Industry leaders from the digital advertising sector will convene in Washington on April 3, 2025, to address critical issues within the industry. This gathering aims to tackle challenges such as data privacy regulations, compliance issues, and the integration of artificial intelligence. The event will see participation from a diverse group of professionals to deliberate on these pressing matters. This initiative comes amidst a rapidly changing landscape, where staying abreast of legal, policy, and technical developments is crucial. The forum will focus on these aspects to ensure the industry adapts and thrives in the face of these challenges.

news.headline: Fitch downgrades China to A; outlook stable.
Wintermute moved $75M FDUSD post-depeg, seizing $3M arbitrage. FDUSD stablecoin remains resilient, disputes insolvency claims.
news.summary: Market makers have spotted a potential $3 million arbitrage opportunity related to the depegging of the FDUSD stablecoin, which occurred on April 2 after Justin Sun claimed the stablecoin issuer was insolvent. Wintermute transferred 75 million FDUSD tokens back to First Digital within a day of the depegging when the stablecoin dropped to $0.87. Wintermute also had over 31 million FDUSD tokens from Binance, potentially making over $3 million profit if they bought near the bottom at $0.90. Despite insolvency claims, First Digital assured the stablecoin is fully backed and solvent, but previous assessments have highlighted potential weaknesses in FDUSD's stability. First Digital plans to take legal action against Sun's false bankruptcy allegations that led to the depegging. The crypto market has seen large-scale liquidations recently, but market makers like Wintermute are leveraging opportunities like the FDUSD depegging for profits.

news.headline: March sees a boost in small business sales, according to Fiserv Small Business Index.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 6.5%, with a total of 2.3 million people currently out of work. This rise in unemployment is believed to be due to the economic impact of the ongoing global pandemic. Many industries, such as hospitality and retail, have been particularly hard hit, resulting in significant job losses. The government has announced plans to address this issue by implementing various stimulus measures and job creation programs to help reduce the unemployment rate and support those in need.Overall, the situation remains challenging, but efforts are being made to mitigate the impact and restore stability to the job market.

news.headline: Lamb Weston reports Q3 results, reaffirms fiscal year 2025 targets, sees improved volume trends and profitability.
news.summary: EAGLE, Idaho – Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. released its third-quarter fiscal 2025 results, with a reaffirmation of its full-year financial targets for the same fiscal year. The company's efforts to enhance operational efficiency led to improved volume trends and profitability metrics by the end of the quarter. Mike Smith, Lamb Weston’s president, stated that the actions implemented at the beginning of fiscal 2025 were successful, aligning with the updated outlook for fiscal 2025. The company's stock is listed as NYSE: LW.

news.headline: Guess?, Inc. forms special committee to review & respond to WHP Global's $13.00/share acquisition proposal.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Guess?, Inc. (NYSE: GES) revealed that the Special Committee of the Board of Directors has been established to assess the non-binding proposal from WHP Global's affiliate, WHP Investments, LLC. This proposal suggests acquiring outstanding shares of Guess? at $13.00 per share in cash, excluding shares held by select existing shareholders like Paul Marciano and Maurice Marcia.
